ValidationEmail: Please enter a valid email address
ValidationPasswordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters long
ResetLinkSent: Password reset link sent to your email.
PasswordResetSuccess: Your password has been reset successfully.
EmailResetPasswordMessage: You requested to reset your password. Click the button below to proceed:
EmailResetPasswordIgnore: If you didn't request this, please ignore this email. Your password will remain unchanged.
EmailResetPasswordExpiry: This link will expire in 15 minutes.
EmailResetPasswordFooter: This is an automated message, please do not reply.
AccessDenied: Access denied. You don't have permission to access this resource.
InvalidRole: Invalid role. Role must be 'user' or 'admin'.
EmailRoleChangeTitle: Your Role Has Been Updated - SaaS Starter
EmailRoleChangeMessage: We wanted to let you know that your account role in SaaS Starter has been updated.
EmailRoleChangeInfo: If you have any questions about this change, please contact our support team.
EmailAccountDeletedTitle: Your Account Has Been Deleted - SaaS Starter
EmailAccountDeletedMessage: We're writing to inform you that your SaaS Starter account has been removed by an administrator.
EmailAccountDeletedWarningMessage: Your account and all associated data have been permanently removed from our system.
EmailAccountDeletedInfo: If you believe this was done in error, please contact our support team immediately.
EmailFooterText: Thank you for being part of SaaS Starter
EmailFooterNote: This is an automated message. Please do not reply to this email.
UserRegisteredPleaseVerify: User registered successfully. Please check your email to verify your account.
UserRegisteredSuccess: User registered successfully. You can now log in.
EmailNotVerified: Please verify your email address before logging in. Check your inbox for the verification link.
EmailVerifiedSuccess: Email verified successfully! You can now log in.
EmailVerificationTitle: Verify Your Email Address - SaaS Starter
EmailVerificationMessage: To complete your registration and get started with the platform, please verify your email address by clicking the button below.
EmailVerificationExpiry: This link will expire in 24 hours.
EmailVerificationThankYou: Thank you for being part of our community
TokenRevoked: Token has been revoked. Please log in again.
TokenExpired: Token has expired. Please log in again.
TwoFactorCodeSent: A 6-digit verification code has been sent to your email.
TwoFactorCodeExpired: Verification code has expired. Please request a new one.
Email2FATitle: Your Login Verification Code - SaaS Starter
Email2FAMessage: Use the code below to complete your login:
Email2FAExpiry: This code will expire in 5 minutes.
Email2FASecurity: ⚠️ If you didn't attempt to log in, please secure your account immediately.
Email2FAClosing: Thank you for using SaaS Starter
TOTPCodeRequired: Please enter the code from your authenticator app.
TwoFASetupGenerated: Two-factor authentication setup generated. Scan the QR code with your authenticator app.
TwoFANotSetup: Two-factor authentication has not been set up. Please set it up first.
TwoFANotEnabled: Two-factor authentication is not enabled for this account.
FailedToGenerate2FA: Failed to generate two-factor authentication secret.
2FARequired: Two-factor authentication is required for this account. Please enable 2FA to continue.
2FAMustBeEnabled: You must enable two-factor authentication before you can log in.
RecoveryCodesWarning: ⚠️ IMPORTANT: Save these recovery codes in a safe place. You can use them to log in if you lose access to your authenticator app. Each code can only be used once.
RecoveryCodeUsed: Logged in successfully using a recovery code. Please generate new recovery codes if needed.
InvalidRecoveryCode: Invalid or already used recovery code.
RecaptchaVerificationFailed: reCAPTCHA verification failed. Please try again or contact support if the problem persists.
InvalidGoogleToken: Invalid Google authentication token. Please try again.
GoogleEmailNotFound: Google account email not found. Please try again.
GoogleOAuthNotConfigured: Google OAuth is not configured. Please contact support.
RateLimitExceeded: Too many requests. You have been temporarily blocked. Please try again later.
IPBlocked: Your IP address has been temporarily blocked due to too many failed attempts. Please try again later.
IPNotFoundOrNotBlocked: IP address not found or is not currently blocked
IPUnblockedSuccessfully: IP address has been unblocked successfully
InvalidDate: Invalid date format. Please enter a date in YYYY-MM-DD format.
InvalidDateRange: Start date cannot be after end date.
DateRangeTooLarge: Date range is too large. Maximum 365 days allowed.
